input.command:
curl -s "https://api.relay.link/chains" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
chains = json.load(sys.stdin)['chains']
eth = next((c for c in chains if c.get('id') == 1), None)
base = next((c for c in chains if c.get('id') == 8453), None)
print('ETH iconUrl:', eth.get('iconUrl') if eth else 'NOT FOUND')
print('Base iconUrl:', base.get('iconUrl') if base else 'NOT FOUND')
"
input.description: Check Relay API chain iconUrl values

metadata.description: Check Relay API chain iconUrl values

state.title:
curl -s "https://api.relay.link/chains" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
chains = json.load(sys.stdin)['chains']
eth = next((c for c in chains if c.get('id') == 1), None)
base = next((c for c in chains if c.get('id') == 8453), None)
print('ETH iconUrl:', eth.get('iconUrl') if eth else 'NOT FOUND')
print('Base iconUrl:', base.get('iconUrl') if base else 'NOT FOUND')
"
